ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "series" TEXT /* Stock series */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the stock */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* 52-week high price of the stock */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* 52-week low price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_series FOREIGN KEY ("series") REFERENCES stock_series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_trading_data" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ID */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading data */,
  "prev_close" REAL /* Previous day's closing price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the day */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last traded price */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price */,
  "total_traded_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity traded */,
  "turnover" REAL /* Total turnover */,
  "no_of_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades */,
  "deliverable_qty" INTEGER /* Deliverable quantity */,
  "dly_qty_to_traded_qty" REAL /* Percentage of deliverable quantity to traded quantity */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the day */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price of the stock during pre-market trading */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* Price of the stock during after-market trading */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day's close */,
  "price_change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day's close */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_trading_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view, download) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the user's browser or device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the strategy was created */,
  "backtest_results" TEXT /* Results of backtesting the strategy */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the strategy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading signal */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "signal_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading signal */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of the trading signal (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "signal_price" REAL /* Price at which the signal was generated */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the signal */,
  "backtest_confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the signal based on backtesting */,
  "execution_status" TEXT /* Status of the signal execution (e.g., executed, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_signals_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_signals_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the trade */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee charged for the trade */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time at which the trade was executed */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy used for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "total_profit_loss" REAL /* Total profit or loss of the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the holding */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss of the holding */,
  "average_purchase_price" REAL /* Average purchase price of the holding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolio ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market index */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the market index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the index was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index component */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the stock in the index */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the stock in the index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_components_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_components_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., annual report, quarterly report) */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL to the report file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the report */,
  "fiscal_quarter" TEXT /* Fiscal quarter of the report */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the report file (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "article_date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "article_url" TEXT /* URL to the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the news article */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the news article to the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
